sentence: 汉语和闽南语同属汉藏语族。
pinyin: Hànyǔ hé Mǐnnányǔ tóng shǔ Hàn-Zàng yǔzú.
english: Mandarin and Hokkien both belong to the Sino-Tibetan language branch.

sentence: 上级派人来督办这个项目，确保按时完成。
pinyin: Shàngjí pài rén lái dūbàn zhège xiàngmù, quèbǎo ànshí wánchéng.
english: The higher-ups sent someone to oversee the project and ensure it would be completed on time.

sentence: 他喜欢做短线投资，快进快出赚差价。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān zuò duǎnxiàn tóuzī, kuài jìn kuài chū zhuàn chājià.
english: He likes short-term investing, buying and selling quickly to profit from price differences.

sentence: 今年公司有盈余，员工都得到了年终奖。
pinyin: Jīnnián gōngsī yǒu yíngyú, yuángōng dōu dédào le niánzhōng jiǎng.
english: The company had a surplus this year, so all employees received a year-end bonus.

sentence: 寺庙里住着几位尼姑，每天诵经礼佛。
pinyin: Sìmiào lǐ zhùzhe jǐ wèi nígū, měitiān sòng jīng lǐ Fó.
english: Several Buddhist nuns live in the temple, chanting sutras and paying respects every day.
